first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (3/10) and disqualify the candidate for the exact same primary reasons: being massively overqualified and lacking the required German language skills. Minor differences in wording, such as estimating experience as 'nearly 20 years' versus '15+ years', are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run noise and do not reflect a change in the core assessment.
